question_sentence: Who was named artist of the year at the fan-voted American Music Awards on Monday?
Which high-end carmaker this week revealed the Luce, its first fully electric car?
Which tennis player collapsed from the heat at the French Open this week?
Which former UK prime minister wrote an open letter urging the Labour government to scrap net zero targets and slash welfare spending?
Thousands of employees at which tech giant have secured a six-figure payout?
Muslims worldwide celebrated which holiday, one of the major festivals in the Islamic calendar?
Pope Leo quoted which author of secular bestsellers in his first papal encyclical?
Which oil giant removed its chairman after less than a year because of “serious concerns” about his conduct?
A buffalo in Bangladesh has been spared from ritual slaughter over its perceived resemblance to which world leader?
Which US states launched an investigation into Fifa’s 2026 World Cup ticket prices?
Construction is underway for the first major sporting event at the White House. What type of competition will be featured?
evidence: Construction crews are building a “cage” on the South Lawn for a mixed martial arts showdown next month. It's set to be the first major sporting event ever held on White House grounds.

question_sentence: Several villagers trapped in a flooded cave made international headlines this week. Where did the incident occur?
evidence: Several villagers in Laos were trapped while searching for gold in a flooded cave. A multinational rescue team is involved in the effort to bring them to safety.

question_sentence: Which country partially restored internet access following an 88-day nationwide blackout?
evidence: Iran has partially restored internet access following an 88-day nationwide blackout imposed by authorities, according to state media.

question_sentence: Which member of the Trump family got married this week?
evidence: Donald Trump Jr.'s wedding weekend in the Bahamas has remained remarkably under wraps, even days later.

question_sentence: Which public figure warned this week that rapidly advancing AI technology is fueling global conflicts?
evidence: Pope Leo warned that artificial intelligence should not be controlled by the hands “of a few” in the first major theological document of his pontificate.

question_sentence: Which US city could disappear beneath rising sea levels faster than many experts once thought?
evidence: According to a new expert analysis, rising sea levels will swallow New Orleans faster than many realize. Scientists say people should begin relocating now before the city's risks become much more difficult to manage.

question_sentence: What does Memorial Day honor in the United States?
evidence: May 25 was Memorial Day, honoring American soldiers who died serving the country in wars. It is observed annually in the US on the last Monday in May.

question_sentence: Which continent is experiencing an unusually early and extreme heat wave?
evidence: Temperature records are being smashed across Europe as parts of the continent swelter in a heat wave that is bringing extreme temperatures alarmingly early in the year.

question_sentence: Which luxury automaker recently unveiled its first electric car?
evidence: Ferrari unveiled its first electric car — and it comes with a $640,000 price tag.

question_sentence: Which basketball team reached its first NBA Finals since 1999?
evidence: The New York Knicks blew out the Cleveland Cavaliers to complete a series sweep and reach their first NBA Finals since 1999.
